TH_SANAE-STRIKE.title: Strike
TH_SANAE-DEFEND.title: Defend
TH_SANAE-GRAY_MIRACLE.title: Secret Art [Gray Miracle]
TH_SANAE-WIND_SLASH_WAVE.title: Wind Slash Wave
TH_SANAE-AUTUMN_WIND_SLASH.title: Autumn Wind Sweeps Fallen Leaves
TH_SANAE-AUTUMN_WIND_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 1 time and apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Wind Mastery 10[/gold]: Deal {Cards:diff()} additional times.
TH_SANAE-BERSERK_WIND.title: Berserk Wind Combo
TH_SANAE-BERSERK_WIND.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold] {Power:diff()} time(s).
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Power:diff()} time(s).
[gold]Wind Mastery 10[/gold]: This card's base number of hits +1 this combat.
Whenever you enter or exit [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], return this card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-STAND_ON_GOD_LAKE.title: Stand Upon the Divine Lake
TH_SANAE-STAND_ON_GOD_LAKE.description:
For every {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold] you have, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
If in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], [gold]Stop Wind[/gold]; otherwise, [gold]Summon Wind[/gold] and draw {Power:diff()} card(s).
TH_SANAE-WIND_GONE_MILES.title: Wind Travels a Thousand Miles
TH_SANAE-WIND_GONE_MILES.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
If in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], draw {ExtraCards:diff()} additional card(s).
TH_SANAE-WIND_END_GRASS.title: Cease Amidst the Wilderness
TH_SANAE-WIND_END_GRASS.description: Whenever you draw this card, take damage equal to your [gold]Wind Force[/gold], then [gold]Stop Wind[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_FROM_END.title: Wind Rises from the Tip of Grass
TH_SANAE-WIND_FROM_END.description:
Can only be played while not in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
[gold]Summon Wind[/gold].
Multiply your [gold]Wind Force[/gold] by {Cards:diff()}.
Add 1 [gold]Cease Amidst the Wilderness[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
[gold]Retain[/gold].|}
TH_SANAE-T_H10.title: Mountain of Faith
TH_SANAE-T_H10.description:
This combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards related to [gold]Wind[/gold].
At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Spell Cards[/gold] with 0 cost, [gold]Exhaust[/gold], and [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_RAISE_CLOUD_RISE.title: Wind Rises, Clouds Stir
TH_SANAE-GREAT_WIND_WITH_CLOUD_FLY.title: A Great Wind Rises, Clouds Fly High
TH_SANAE-GREAT_WIND_WITH_CLOUD_FLY.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
[gold]Wind Mastery 7[/gold]: Draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s).
TH_SANAE-HOWLING_WIND.title: Wind Fills the Tower Before Rain
TH_SANAE-HOWLING_WIND.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
At the start of your next 2 turns, [gold]Summon Wind[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FAITH_HEAL.title: Faith Heals Flesh
TH_SANAE-WIND_LAKE_THEURGIST.title: Wind and Lake's Theurgist
TH_SANAE-WIND_LAKE_THEURGIST.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Wind Mastery 8[/gold] / [gold]Piety 4[/gold]: Draw 1 additional card.
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_THIRD_GOD.title: Moriya's Third God
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_THIRD_GOD.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SANAE_MILK.title: Sanae's Milk
TH_SANAE-SANAE_MILKY.title: Sanae Dairy
TH_SANAE-SANAE_MILKY.description: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sanae's Milk[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-PRAY_FOR_MORNING_WIND.title: Pray for Morning Wind
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_FAITH.title: Faith Collection
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_FAITH.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Transfer enemies' [gold]Faith[/gold] to yourself|Remove enemies' [gold]Faith[/gold]}, then make them lose HP equal to the amount.
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO_SUMMON_DEFEND.title: Earth God Summon - Shield
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_SUMMON_WIND.title: Heaven God Summon - Wind
TH_SANAE-WIND_FLOWER_SNOW_MOON.title: Wind, Flower, Snow, Moon
TH_SANAE-WIND_FLOWER_SNOW_MOON.descripti:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-WIND_BLAST.title: Wind Blast
TH_SANAE-WIND_CAUGHT.title: Catch the Wind
TH_SANAE-WIND_CAUGHT.description: All enemies lose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn, and you gain that much [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MIGHTY_WIND.title: Mighty Wind
TH_SANAE-MIGHTY_WIND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Wind Force[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
TH_SANAE-BIND_SNAKE_COME_ON.title: Go, Binding Snake!
TH_SANAE-WIND_RIDER.title: Wind Rider
TH_SANAE-WIND_RIDER.description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_SANAE-WIND_RIDER.upgradedescription:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_SANAE-WIND_RIDER.upgrade2description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_SANAE-WIND_MASTER.title: Wind Master
TH_SANAE-WIND_MASTER.description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 2[/gold]
Double [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
Immediately deal damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} times equal to [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_MASTER.upgradedescription:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Double [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
Immediately deal damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} times equal to [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_MASTER.upgrade2description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Double [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
Immediately deal damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} times equal to [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-GREEN_SNAKE_COME_ON.title: Go, Green Snake!
TH_SANAE-GREEN_SNAKE_COME_ON.description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_SANAE-GREEN_SNAKE_COME_ON.upgradedesc:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_SANAE-CONGRATULATION.title: Congratulation
TH_SANAE-BUMPER_GRAIN_HARVEST.title: Divine Virtue [Bumper Grain Harvest Rice Bath]
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_HUMAN_GOD.title: Miracle-Working Living God
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_HUMAN_GOD.description: Some random outcomes are always the best possible for you.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_OF_DROP.title: Miracle of Falling Objects
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_PRAYER.title: Wind Priestess Prayer
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_PRAYER.descriptio:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
Shuffle {Power:diff()} [gold]Congratulation[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
[gold]Piety 8[/gold]: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all [gold]cards in hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_GONE_GRASS_DOWN.title: Wind Blows, Grass Bends
TH_SANAE-WIND_GONE_GRASS_DOWN.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If this card kills an enemy, play it again.
TH_SANAE-WIND_CRAWL.title: Wind Howls, Cranes Cry
TH_SANAE-WIND_CRAWL.description: Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} time(s), and add X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Grass and Trees Are Soldiers+[/gold]|[gold]Grass and Trees Are Soldiers[/gold]} to your hand.
TH_SANAE-GRASS_TREE_SOLIDER.title: Grass and Trees Are Soldiers
TH_SANAE-GRASS_TREE_SOLIDER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 0 times.
Deal 1 additional hit for each [gold]card in hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.title: Wind God's Lake
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.description:
The minimum [gold]Wind Force[/gold] required to maintain [gold]Wind Rising[/gold] is reduced by {Cards:diff()}.
While in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], [gold]Wind Force[/gold] decay is reduced by {Cards:diff()}0%.
TH_SANAE-HARVEST_RICE.title: Harvest Rice
TH_SANAE-HARVEST_RICE.description:
When drawn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
When [gold]Exhaust[/gold]ed, double your Energy.
TH_SANAE-I_LIKE_IT.title: Faith Rising
TH_SANAE-RESERVATION.title: Reservation Sanae
TH_SANAE-RESERVATION.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain 5 [gold]Faith[/gold].
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Induce[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Persuade[/gold].
TH_SANAE-PERSON_OF_WIND_SACRIFICE.title: Person of Wind Sacrifice
TH_SANAE-PERSON_OF_WIND_SACRIFICE.descri: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain [gold]Faith[/gold] equal to half your [gold]Wind Force[/gold]|Convert [gold]Wind Force[/gold] to [gold]Faith[/gold] at a rate of {Cards:diff()}:1}.
TH_SANAE-SACRIFICED_PERSON_OF_WIND.title: Sacrificed Person of Wind
TH_SANAE-SACRIFICED_PERSON_OF_WIND.descr: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Wind Force[/gold] equal to your [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SHINSAKAKI_SACRIFICE.title: Shinsakaki Sacrifice
TH_SANAE-SHINSAKAKI_SACRIFICE.descriptio:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If you exhausted a [gold]Congratulation[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-FAITH_BROKEN.title: Broken Faith
TH_SANAE-FAITH_BROKEN.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, lose all [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FAITH_FOR_NULL.title: Faith Is for the Phantom People
TH_SANAE-FAITH_FOR_NULL.description: At the end of your turn, if there are no non-[gold]Minion[/gold] non-[gold]Devotee[/gold] enemies other than yourself, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FAITH_NOT_NULL.title: Faith Can Never Go Below Zero
TH_SANAE-FAITH_NOT_NULL.description:
If the enemy is not a [gold]Devotee[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage [gold]Faith[/gold] times.
If the enemy is a [gold]Devotee[/gold], apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Induce[/gold].
[gold]Persuade[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_WIND.title: Miracle [Divine Wind]
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_WIND.upgrade2descriptio:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold] to [gold]Chant 8[/gold]
[gold]Summon Wind[/gold].
Deal 1 damage to ALL enemies [gold]Wind Force[/gold] times.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_STAR.title: Miracle [Daytime Guest Star]
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_STAR.description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 2[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies 3 times, apply [gold]Induce[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_STAR.upgradedescription:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Stun[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_STAR.upgrade2descriptio:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 3[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, gain [gold]Faith[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_PREPARE.title: Preparation [Secret Festival Rite]
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_PREPARE.upgradetitle: Preparation [Star Ritual that Calls Divine Wind]
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_PREPARE.upgradedescript:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 2[/gold]
Add 1 [gold]Miracle [Divine Wind][/gold] with random upgrade progress to your [gold]hand[/gold], and its Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_PREPARE.upgrade2descrip:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 3[/gold]
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold], and apply 10 [gold]Induce[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Piety 50[/gold]: Add 5 random [gold]upgraded[/gold] [gold]Kanako cards[/gold] to your hand with 0 cost before first play this turn.
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI.title: Omikuji
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} [gold]cards in hand[/gold] and perform a [gold]Fortune Draw[/gold], changing their Energy cost this combat based on the result:
[gold]Great Luck[/gold]: Cost becomes 0.
[green]Luck[/green]: Cost -1.
[red]Bad Luck[/red]: Cost +1.
[purple]Great Curse[/purple]: Double the cost.
TH_SANAE-SUMMONING_OMIKUJI.title: Sanae's Omikuji Summoning Art
TH_SANAE-SUMMONING_OMIKUJI.description: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Omikuji[/gold] to your hand.
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI_THROW.title: Omikuji Toss
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI_THROW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Cards:diff()} time(s).
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_PROTECTION.title: Moriya's Protection
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_PROTECTION.description: If the last card played this combat was an [gold]Attack[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, |}apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage; otherwise, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SELFISH_SHRINE_MAIDEN.title: Selfish Shrine Maiden
TH_SANAE-SELFISH_SHRINE_MAIDEN.descripti: This turn, you have no restrictions on playing cards, but for each card played, {IfUpgraded:show:take 2 damage|lose 2 HP}.
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_HOME.title: Where the Wind Priestess Dwells
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_HOME.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_CONFRONTATION.des:
Can only be played if all enemies intend to attack.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_SANAE-PURIFICATION_RITUAL.title: Purification Ritual
TH_SANAE-PURIFICATION_RITUAL.description:
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Curse[/gold] and [gold]Status[/gold] cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold], [gold]discard pile[/gold], and [gold]hand[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_SANAE-PURIFICATION_RITUAL.upgradedesc:
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Curse[/gold] and [gold]Status[/gold] cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold], [gold]discard pile[/gold], and [gold]hand[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_SANAE-COBALT_SPREAD.title: Cobalt Spread
TH_SANAE-COBALT_SPREAD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Cards:diff()} time(s).
[gold]Wind Mastery 8[/gold]: Damage is increased by 3.
TH_SANAE-INDUCE_EXECUTE.title: Induce Execution
TH_SANAE-INDUCE_EXECUTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target is a [gold]Devotee[/gold], apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold]; otherwise, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Induce[/gold].
[gold]Persuade[/gold].
TH_SANAE-STORM_SHOWING_UP.title: Storm Arrives Suddenly
TH_SANAE-STORM_SHOWING_UP.description:
[gold]Summon Wind[/gold].
Immediately deal damage to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} times equal to [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_SACRIFICE_SECRET.title: Moriya Sacrificial Secret Art
TH_SANAE-SUB_MORIYA_THANKS_MYA.title: Follow Moriya Shrine, Thank You Nya
TH_SANAE-GOD_WIND_RAISE_FROM_MOUNTAIN.ti: Divine Wind Rises from the Sacred Mountain
TH_SANAE-GOD_WIND_RAISE_FROM_MOUNTAIN.de:
Can only be played while not in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
[gold]Wind Mastery 12[/gold]: [gold]Summon Wind[/gold].
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-CLEAN_AND_UPRIGHT.title: Pure and Upright
TH_SANAE-CLEAN_AND_UPRIGHT.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw 1 card.
TH_SANAE-FANTASY_TRAFFIC_LIGHT.title: Fantasy Traffic Light
TH_SANAE-FANTASY_TRAFFIC_LIGHT.descripti:
Triggers a different effect based on the type of the last card played this combat.
[gold]Skill[/gold]: Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Power[/gold]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Attack[/gold]: Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FAITH_CONVERT_MONEY.title: Faith Monetization
TH_SANAE-FAITH_CONVERT_MONEY.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all enemies' [gold]Faith[/gold] and gain that much [gold]Gold[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FLOWER_BIRD_WIND_MOON.title: Flower, Bird, Wind, Moon
TH_SANAE-FLOWER_BIRD_WIND_MOON.descripti:
At the start of your turn, gain a buff in the order of "Flower, Bird, Wind, Moon."
Flower: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Bird: Gain 3 [gold]Flight[/gold].
Wind: Double [gold]Wind Force[/gold]; if none, gain 10 instead.
Moon: Draw 4 cards.
TH_SANAE-HEART_HONEST_ENOUGH.title: A Sincere Heart Is Enough
TH_SANAE-HEART_HONEST_ENOUGH.description: If you are a [gold]Devotee[/gold], [gold]Chant[/gold] effects only make you lose X HP.
TH_SANAE-KAMI_KAKUSHI.title: Into Gensokyo
TH_SANAE-KAMI_KAKUSHI.description:
Can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
End your turn.
TH_SANAE-KAMIKAZE.title: Kamikaze
TH_SANAE-KAMIKAZE.description: At the end of your turn, deal {Cards:diff()} damage to ALL characters.
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_SUMMON_RUSH.title: Heaven God Summon - Rush
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_SUMMON_RUSH.description:
If the target's intent is not to attack, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target still has [gold]Block[/gold], deal 1 additional time.
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_SUMMON_ONBASHIRA.title: Heaven God Summon - Onbashira
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_SUMMON_ONBASHIRA.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} time(s).
Each time this card is played, all cards with the same name gain +1 hit this combat.
TH_SANAE-MYSTERY_FRUIT.title: Miracle [Miracle Fruit]
TH_SANAE-MYSTERY_FRUIT.description:
Cannot be [gold]Upgraded[/gold].
Heal 25% of your max HP.
Gain 1 [gold]Miracle Fruit[/gold].
[gold]Ephemeral[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MASTER_WIND.title: Ride the Wind
TH_SANAE-MASTER_WIND.description:
At the start of your turn, if you are in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], [gold]Wind Force[/gold] no longer decays.
At the end of your turn, if your [gold]Wind Force[/gold] is sufficient to maintain [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], automatically enter [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
TH_SANAE-PRIMAL_JAPANESE_SCENE_THE_GIRL_: The Primordial Japanese Landscape the Girl Saw
At the start of your turn, choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] and return them to your hand with 0 cost before first play.
TH_SANAE-SACRIFICED_RETURN_PARTLY.title: Sacrifice into Self
TH_SANAE-SACRIFICED_RETURN_PARTLY.descri: Whenever you lose HP from a card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-SANAE_CAT_FORM.title: Sanae Cat Form
TH_SANAE-SANAE_CAT_FORM.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Summon Wind[/gold], then gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_KAGURA_DANCE.desc:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
Draw 2 cards.
[gold]Piety 5[/gold]: Choose a card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] and return it to your hand{IfUpgraded:show:, with 0 cost before first play|}.
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_KAGURA_DANCE.sele: Select any number of cards to discard.
TH_SANAE-SHRINE_MAIDEN_KAGURA_DANCE.retu: Select a card to return to your hand.
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO_SUMMON_TRAP.title: Earth God Summon - Trap
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO_SUMMON_TRAP.description: The first {Cards:diff()} times you are attacked each turn, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.
TH_SANAE-WISH_OF_BUSINESS_BOOM.title: Wish [Protect Commercial Prosperity]
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO_SUMMON_WHEEL.title: Earth God Summon - Wheel
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO_SUMMON_WHEEL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} time(s).
Put this card into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
TH_SANAE-YOKAI_PUNISH.title: Youkai Subjugation
TH_SANAE-YOKAI_PUNISH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} time(s).
For each [gold]Defend[/gold] in your hand, damage is increased by {IfUpgraded:show:5|3}.
For each [gold]Strike[/gold] in your hand, deal 1 additional hit.
TH_SANAE-YOKAI_PLUNDER.title: Youkai Power Plunder
TH_SANAE-YOKAI_PLUNDER.description: All enemies lose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn, and you gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_SANAE-YES_GIVE_TOM.title: Tomorrow's Prosperity, Yesterday's Customs
TH_SANAE-YES_GIVE_TOM.description: Whenever you play a card{IfUpgraded:show:| with non-zero Energy cost}, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-BROCKEN_PHENOMENON.title: Brocken Phenomenon
TH_SANAE-BROCKEN_PHENOMENON.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Induce[/gold].
When [gold]Exhaust[/gold]ed, add 1 [gold]Hisoutensoku[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
TH_SANAE-HISOUTENSOKU.title: Hisoutensoku
TH_SANAE-HISOUTENSOKU.description:
When drawn, lose all [gold]Induce[/gold], then gain that much [gold]Faith[/gold].
[gold]Piety 20[/gold]: Double your [gold]Faith[/gold].
Otherwise, gain [gold]Faith[/gold] up to 20.
Apply [gold]Faith[/gold] equal to your own to ALL enemies and [gold]Persuade[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Broken Faith[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_SANAE-GHOST.title: Haunting
TH_SANAE-GHOST.description: Whenever you draw this card, add [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to all [gold]cards in hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-NINE_STAB.title: Secret Art [Nine Syllable Slash]
TH_SANAE-NINE_STAB.description:
[gold]Chant 1[/gold], [gold]Chant 2[/gold], [gold]Chant 3[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} time(s).
TH_SANAE-SEA_OPENING.title: Sea Opening [The Day the Sea Parted]
TH_SANAE-SEA_OPENING.description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 1[/gold]
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SEA_OPENING.upgradetitle: Sea Opening [The Day the Sea Became a Path]
TH_SANAE-SEA_OPENING.upgradedescription:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 2[/gold]
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from ALL enemies.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain 6 [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SEA_OPENING.upgrade2description:
[gold]Spell Card[/gold]
[gold]Chant 2[/gold]
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy and deal damage equal to the [gold]Block[/gold] removed.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
TH_SANAE-WIND_MIRACLE_RICE_BAR.title: Wind and Miracle Pure Rice Wine
TH_SANAE-WIND_MIRACLE_RICE_BAR.descripti:
Cannot be [gold]Upgraded[/gold].
Heal HP equal to your [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
Can be played {Cards:diff()} additional times, then [gold]Ephemeral[/gold].
When played, if you have [gold]Harvest Rice[/gold] in hand, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all of them and gain that many extra plays.
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI_BOMB.title: Omikuji Bomb
TH_SANAE-ARMY_GOD_FORM.title: War God Form
TH_SANAE-ARMY_GOD_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_SANAE-BOILING_BLOOD.title: Boiling Blood
TH_SANAE-BOILING_BLOOD.description: Whenever you lose HP, gain that much [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_SANAE-EXTEND_ONBASHRIA.title: Extend Onbashira
TH_SANAE-EXTEND_ONBASHRIA.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]card in hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FAITH_CALL.title: Call for Faith
TH_SANAE-FAITH_CALL.description: At the end of your turn, all enemies lose half of their current [gold]Faith[/gold], and you gain that much [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-GOD_POWER_LIGHT.title: God's Radiant Might
TH_SANAE-GOD_POWER_LIGHT.description: All enemies lose HP equal to {IfUpgraded:show:a percentage of|your} [gold]Faith[/gold].
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_ONBASHIRA_SUMMON.title: Kanako's Onbashira Summoning Art
TH_SANAE-KANAKO_ONBASHIRA_SUMMON.descrip: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Heaven God Summon - Onbashira[/gold] with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to your hand.
TH_SANAE-MARTIAL_TRAINING.title: Martial Training
TH_SANAE-MARTIAL_TRAINING.description:
Lose {Cards:diff()} HP.
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to your [gold]Vigor[/gold]|Convert [gold]Vigor[/gold] to [gold]Strength[/gold].}
TH_SANAE-TECH_INNOVATION.title: Technological Innovation
TH_SANAE-TECH_INNOVATION.description:
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] all non-temporary cards in your hand.
[red]Progress comes at a cost[/red].
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_VIRTUE.title: Wind God's Virtue
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_VIRTUE.description: At the end of your turn, deal damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} times equal to [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-EVERYTHING_READY_EXCEPT_EAST_WI: Everything Is Ready, Except the East Wind

All characters draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
All characters gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_REAPPEAR.title: Miracle Reappears
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_REAPPEAR.description: Whenever you trigger [gold]Miracle[/gold], all allies play a copy of the card that triggered [gold]Miracle[/gold].
TH_SANAE-COBALT_SKY.title: Cobalt Blue Sky
TH_SANAE-COBALT_SKY.description:
Whenever you lose [gold]Wind Force[/gold], heal that much HP.
Whenever you lose HP, gain that much [gold]Wind Force[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_TWO_GOD_BLESSING.title: Moriya's Divine Protection
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_TWO_GOD_BLESSING.descrip:
Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_MIRACLE_MIKO.title: Moriya Miracle Shrine Maiden
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_MIRACLE_MIKO.description: Whenever you play a card, trigger an additional [gold]Miracle[/gold] check.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_HAND.title: Miracle Hand
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_HAND.description: Whenever you draw a card, add [gold]Miracle[/gold] to it.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_GENESIS.title: Miracle Genesis
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE_GENESIS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add [gold]Miracle[/gold] to all [gold]cards in hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-MODERN_LIVING_GOD.title: Modern Living God
TH_SANAE-MODERN_LIVING_GOD.description: For each year beyond 2007, sequentially gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] / [gold]Dexterity[/gold] / draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) / gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-AMBITIOUS_MIKO.title: Ambitious Conscientious Shrine Maiden
TH_SANAE-MOUNTAIN_FRESH_GOD.title: New God in the Mountains
TH_SANAE-MOUNTAIN_FRESH_GOD.description: Whenever you play a card, add [gold]Recur 1[/gold] to it.
TH_SANAE-KAMIYO_GREAT_SERPENT.title: Snake Sign [Kamiyo Great Serpent]
TH_SANAE-KAMIYO_GREAT_SERPENT.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Poison[/gold] to the enemy equal to unblocked damage dealt.
TH_SANAE-MANIPULATE_TOAD.title: Frog Sign [Manipulate Toad]
TH_SANAE-MANIPULATE_TOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Exhaust[/gold]|Discard} up to {Cards:diff()} cards, then draw that many.
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI_RIOT_THROW.title: Divine Sign [Riotous Omikuji Toss]
TH_SANAE-OMIKUJI_RIOT_THROW.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s), then [gold]Fortune Draw[/gold]; if the result is [gold]Great Luck[/gold], play the drawn card; if the result is not [red]Bad Luck[/red]/[purple]Great Curse[/purple], repeat drawing and [gold]Fortune Draw[/gold].
TH_SANAE-CLOUD_SWIMMING_SERPENT.title: Snake Sign [Cloud-Swimming Serpent]
TH_SANAE-CLOUD_SWIMMING_SERPENT.descript:
Draw until you draw an [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
Gain 1 [gold]Flight[/gold] for each card drawn.
TH_SANAE-FLYING_SNAKE.title: Flying Snake
TH_SANAE-STARFALL.title: Starfall
TH_SANAE-STARFALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
That enemy loses that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_SANAE-RISING_WAVE.title: Rising Wave
TH_SANAE-RISING_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card (except cards with the same name), return this card to your hand (wherever it is).
